records.ety: [L., fr. Gr.<?/, fr.<?/ to burst forth as flowers, break out, as ulcers; <?/, <?/, out + 'anqei^n to bloom, 'a`nqos flower: cf. F. exanthme.]

defs: An efflorescence or discoloration of the skin; an eruption or breaking out, as in measles, smallpox, scarlatina, and the like diseases; -- sometimes limited to eruptions attended with fever.
